nasb.text: A river of fire was flowing And coming out from before Him; Thousands upon thousands were attending Him, And myriads upon myriads were standing before Him; The court sat, And the books were opened.

esv.text: A stream of fire issued and came out from before him; a thousand thousands served him, and ten thousand times ten thousand stood before him; the court sat in judgment, and the books were opened.

cnv.text: 有火像河湧出， 烈火從他面前冒出； 事奉他的有千千， 侍立在他面前的有萬萬。 審判已經開始， 案卷都展開了。

ccb.text: 从祂面前流出火河， 事奉祂的有千千， 侍立在祂面前的有万万。 祂坐下要审判， 案卷已经展开。
